news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Mongolian Mining Corporation to OTCQX, the largest producer of high-quality washed hard coking coal in Mongolia, trading under ticker MOGLF.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Mongolian Mining Corporation (HKX: 975; OTCQX: MOGLF), the top producer and exporter of high-quality washed hard coking coal (“HCC”) in Mongolia, is now eligible to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. This market operator facilitates trading for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Mongolian Mining Corporation transitioned from the Pink® market to OTCQX.

news.headline: Vontier Corp. survey shows 1.5 million delivery truck drivers in U.S. play key role during busy holiday season.
news.summary: Vontier Corporation, a prominent global provider of essential technologies and solutions for the mobility sector, released new survey findings concerning the challenges faced by delivery drivers during the bustling holiday period. The research sheds light on the experiences of over 1.5 million delivery truck drivers in the US, who play a crucial role in transporting a wide range of goods including household necessities and festive presents. These essential workers are instrumental in ensuring timely deliveries and managing the increased demand during the holiday rush.

news.headline: Immunovia reveals financial calendar for 2025/2026 with reports scheduled, including Year-End 2024 Report on Feb 25, 2025.
news.summary: A diagnostic company based in Lund, Sweden, Immunovia, has unveiled its financial schedule for 2025/2026. The Year-End 2024 Report is set to be released on February 25, 2025, followed by the Q1 Report on May 14. Immunovia aims to transform blood-based diagnostics and enhance survival rates for cancer patients.

news.headline: Terra founder Do Kwon's story inspires Korean indie film 'Crypto Man', depicting youths addicted to stocks and coin speculation.
news.summary: Director Harry Hyun stated that the film will depict the struggles of young individuals who are hooked on trading stocks during the day and engaging in cryptocurrency speculation at night.

news.headline: Ethereum Foundation reveals 2022 Academic Grants winners for blockchain research and Ethereum development.
news.summary: In 2022, the Ethereum Foundation disclosed the beneficiaries of its Academic Grants, aimed at backing research related to blockchain technology and Ethereum progress. The grants are designed to promote innovation and development in these areas to foster advancements in the field. This initiative will provide support to a select number of academic entities and researchers who are focused on enhancing the understanding and application of blockchain technology, with a total of # grants distributed to various deserving recipients.

news.headline: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. files Form 10-Q with SEC on December 10, 2024. Largest distributor in specialized professions.
news.summary: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. recently filed a Form 10-Q with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on December 10, 2024. This financial report can be accessed on the SEC's website at sec.gov and on the company's website at corporate.ferguson.com/investor/financial-information/sec-filings. Ferguson, listed on NYSE as FERG and LSE as FERG, is the leading value-added distributor for specialized professionals.

news.headline: Omnira Software partners with PDQ Decisions to enhance portfolio analysis & reserves management capabilities. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Omnira Software™, a rapidly expanding company specializing in planning, reserves management, and data insights, made known a significant development on December 11, 2024. The company has entered into a strategic alliance with PDQ Decisions™, a renowned expert in portfolio optimization and reserves management solutions. This partnership marks a key milestone for Omnira Software™ as it continues to grow its presence in the market.

news.headline: Canada Nickel reports positive exploration results at Mann Township with 28 of 31 holes showing >0.3% nickel, including 0.52% nickel over 37.5m. New discovery at Mann South with 0.24% nickel over 508m in MAN24-81.
news.summary: Exciting progress persists at Mann West, with 28 out of 31 holes showcasing intervals of over 0.3% nickel, notably MAN24-61 revealing 0.52% nickel over 37.5 meters within 0.28% nickel over 356 meters. Additionally, Mann South sees a promising new discovery as MAN24-81 demonstrates 0.24% nickel over 508 meters. Numerous positive results continue to emerge.

news.headline: ECB and Swiss central bank set to meet Thursday, keep an eye on developments.
Tom Lee of Fundstrat, once a top Wall Street bull, has changed his stance.
Wall Street's top bull Tom Lee drops from Fundstrat, marking a significant shift in market sentiment.
Stantec renews Normal Course Issuer Bid & Automated Share Purchase Plan, no further details provided.
Inflation peaked in 2022 and has been cooling, but recently showed signs of stalling.
news.summary: After reaching a peak in 2022, inflation has started to decrease significantly. However, there has been a recent trend of it stagnating in the past few months.

news.headline: U Power Limited in China introduces autonomous unmanned battery swapping logistics vehicles using AI technology.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, U Power Limited, a leading EV battery power solution provider in China, revealed the introduction of an autonomous unmanned battery swapping logistics vehicle utilizing AI technology. This innovative vehicle has been successfully launched and has completed road tests. U Power continues to solidify its position as a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: Reykjavík District Court dismisses Samskip's case against Eimskip, CEO for alleged wrongful actions in 2021 settlement.
news.summary: Today, the Reykjavík District Court ruled to reject the lawsuit brought by Samskip against the Company and its CEO in April. The lawsuit sought unspecified compensation for alleged wrongful and negligent actions related to a settlement Eimskip reached with the Icelandic Competition Authority in 2021.

news.headline: Russia and BRICS companies are to create an AI development alliance - TASS.

US futures mixed ahead of inflation data. Expectations of a 25 bp rate cut in Dec rose to 86.1%. Analyst predicts 2024 as 'Best Election Year Return Ever'. Indices show varied performance. S&P 500 ETF Trust up 0.09%. Labor productivity increased by 2.2%. Sectors recorded mixed performance with real estate, tech, and materials stocks down. Communication services and consumer staples buoyed the market. For a detailed analysis, visit Benzinga.com.
news.summary: U.S. futures were mixed with Nasdaq 100 and S&P 500 advancing, while Dow Jones and Russell 2000 fell. 10-year and two-year Treasury notes yielded 4.24% and 4.17%. Expectations of a 25 basis point rate cut in Dec rose to 86.1%. Analysts expect CPI to rise from 2.6% to 2.7% annually in Nov, with Core CPI steady at 3.3% YoY and 0.3% monthly gain. In premarket, SPY rose to $603.38 and QQQ advanced to $521.64. U.S. stocks declined on Tues, Dow's losing streak extended. Oracle's weak earnings and Google's quantum chip news impacted market. Labor productivity increased by 2.2% in Q3. Sectors closed negative except communication services and consumer staples. Nasdaq Composite -0.25% at 19,687.24, S&P 500 -0.30% at 6,034.91, Dow Jones -0.35% at 44,247.83, Russell 2000 -0.42% at 2,382.77. Analysts point to 2024 trends.

news.headline: Global industrial gas market expected to reach US$185.73 billion by 2034, growing at 5.3% CAGR. Key markets: Japan, East Asia, South Korea, and China with significant growth projections. Chem industry demand expected to increase to US$35.27 billion by 2034.
news.summary: The global industrial gas market is expected to reach US$110.81 billion in revenue in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 5.3% from 2024 to 2034. The expansion of the semiconductor industry is creating opportunities for industrial gases like nitrogen, ultra-high purity gases, and argon. Technological advancements in semiconductor fabrication and increasing complexity are driving demand for specialized industrial gases. The market is estimated to reach US$185.73 billion by 2034, with Japan expanding at a 4.8% CAGR and East Asia contributing 38.4% of the global market by 2034. Sales in China are projected to reach US$42 billion by 2034, with a growth rate of 6.3%. The chemical industry is expected to increase demand for industrial gases at a CAGR of 5.6% and reach US$35.27 billion by 2034. Leading players are focusing on R&D to drive innovations in production and storage of industrial gases.

news.headline: Vantage Markets marks 15th anniversary with APAC Gala in Bangkok celebrating achievements and partnerships.
news.summary: In Port Vila, Vanuatu, on December 11, 2024, Vantage Markets organized an impressive APAC Gala Dinner in Bangkok to celebrate its 15th anniversary. This event highlighted the company's significant accomplishments and partnerships over the years. The gala gathered Vantage clients, partners, education providers, and other key stakeholders to commemorate this milestone.

news.headline: Centrus Energy's subsidiary, ACO, wins third LEU enrichment award from U.S. DOE, marking progress in nuclear fuel supply program.
news.summary: Centrus Energy, a leader in nuclear fuel supply, has been selected for the third time by the Department of Energy (DOE) for their LEU enrichment award. This award was granted to Centrus' subsidiary, American Centrifuge Operating, LLC (ACO). The announcement was made in Bethesda, Maryland on December 11, 2024. Centrus Energy is listed on the NYSE American under the symbol LEU. This recognition signifies the ongoing success of Centrus in the nuclear industry.

news.headline: Learn from USPS: Musk's DOGE, DeJoy's: Bloomberg.
FinQore named Cool Vendor in 2024 Gartner report for AI in finance, boosting credibility.
news.summary: In Boston on December 11, 2024, FinQore, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven financial data management solutions, revealed its inclusion in the 2024 Gartner Cool Vendors in AI for Finance report by Mark D. McDonald. This acknowledgment reinforces FinQore's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Caris Life Sciences study shows high concordance between NGS-based MSI and immunohistochemistry-based MMR in 190k+ patients.
news.summary: A recent study has shown strong agreement between next-generation sequencing-based microsatellite instability (MSI) and immunohistochemistry-based mismatch repair (MMR) measurements in over 190,000 patients. This groundbreaking analysis was conducted by Caris Life Sciences® (Caris), a top AI TechBio company headquartered in IRVING, Texas, on December 11, 2024. The study reveals the promising potential of these advanced technologies in accurately assessing MSI and MMR statuses with a large sample size.

news.headline: Trimble declared winners of SketchUp 0-60 Challenge promoting innovation in AI and tech for AEC industry.
news.summary: A recent competition has spurred innovation in AI and technology within the architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) sector. Trimble® revealed the victors of the SketchUp® 0-60 event held in Westminster, Colo. on December 11, 2024. The competition aimed to address common industry challenges and propel advancements in the field. Notably, Trimble® (Nasdaq: TRMB) identified the winners, showcasing how such initiatives drive progress within the AEC industry.

news.headline: ABVC BioPharma gets $200,000 from OncoX as first licensing payment, totaling $546,000 from three partners.
news.summary: ABVC BioPharma, Inc., based in Fremont, California, disclosed receiving a $200,000 cash payment from OncoX BioPharma Inc. as an initial part of a strategic licensing deal for specific oncology products. This payment represents the first installment of a possible $5 million in licensing fees from OncoX. Including this recent payment, ABVC has now amassed $546,000 in cash from its three strategic partners for various product licenses. Furthermore, as per the agreement, ABVC, along with its subsidiaries BioLite Inc. and Rgene Corporation, could each be granted up to 10 million OncoX shares, a cash payment of $5 million, and royalties amounting to a maximum of $50 million post the product launches.

news.headline: SeaStar Medical anticipates $XX billion market potential for its selective cytopheretic device in initial target areas.
Nova Minerals reports finding gold up to 141 g/t Au in rock samples at the Stibium Antimony-Gold Prospect in Alaska.
news.summary: In Anchorage, Alaska, on December 11, 2024, Nova Minerals Limited shared positive news regarding their 2024 exploration season findings. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: NVA) (ASX: NVA) (FRA: QM3), revealed the results of gold rock chip assays, confirming the presence of a substantial gold and antimony rich zone at the Stibium prospect. This zone spans a significant area measuring 800 meters in length by 400 meters in width. These findings were made within Nova's flagship Estelle Gold and Critical Minerals Project, which covers over 500 square kilometers and is situated in the Tintina Gold Belt in Alaska.

news.headline: Azimut announces drilling results from Pilipas Property in Quebec's James Bay Region.
Photronics (NASDAQ:PLAB) reports full year and Q4 fiscal 2024 results on Dec 11, with fiscal year ending on October 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Brookfield, Connecticut, on December 11, 2024, Photronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLAB), a prominent global provider of photomask technologies, disclosed its fiscal year 2024 financial outcomes. The reporting period concluded on October 31, 2024, encompassing the full year and the fourth quarter.

news.headline: Clean Energy will design & build new hydrogen station for Riverside Transit Agency, servicing private access, in California.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, Clean Energy, a leading provider of clean fuel for transportation (NASDAQ: CLNE), has secured a contract to build a cutting-edge hydrogen fueling station for Riverside Transit Agency (RTA) in California. This contract, obtained through a competitive bidding process, encompasses the design and construction of a hydrogen fueling station specifically for RTA's private use in Riverside. In addition to the station's creation, Clean Energy will also supply hydrogen and provide maintenance services. This initiative highlights Clean Energy's commitment to environmentally friendly transportation solutions, catering to the growing demand for sustainable fuel alternatives.

news.headline: AUSD debuts on BingX Launchpool for staking with 150,000 AUSD prize pool, providing users easy access to stablecoin staking.
news.summary: In Vilnius, Lithuania on December 11, 2024, BingX, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, revealed the introduction of AUSD on its Launchpool platform. The endeavor includes a substantial prize pool of 150,000 AUSD, providing BingX users with convenient access to staking opportunities while maintaining stability.

news.headline: Parsons Corporation secures $23 million contract to provide engineering services for Caltrans Districts 1, 2, and 3-North.
news.summary: In Chantilly, Virginia, on December 11, 2024, Parsons Corporation disclosed that it has been chosen by the California Department of Transportation (Caltrans) to deliver professional and technical services. The contract, valued at $23 million, involves offering engineering and inspection services on an as-needed basis for structure construction projects in Caltrans Districts 1, 2, and 3-North.

news.headline: US futures mixed as market awaits inflation data. Analyst predicts 2024 as 'Best Election Year Return Ever'. Inflation expected to rise to 2.7% with CPI at 3.3%. Fed rate cut expectations at 86.1%. Indices show varied movement with Nasdaq and S&P up, while Dow and Russell 2000 down. Stocks ended lower on Tuesday with certain industries gaining. Notable stocks were Oracle and Google.
news.summary: U.S. futures were mixed before key inflation data, with Dow Jones and Russell 2000 falling, while Nasdaq 100 and S&P 500 rising. 10-year and two-year Treasury notes yielded 4.24% and 4.17%. Expectations of a 25 basis point rate cut in December rose to 86.1%. Economists expect CPI to rise to 2.7% in November. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was up 0.09% to $603.38, and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF advanced 0.2% to $521.64. U.S. stocks declined on Tuesday, with Oracle Corp.'s weak earnings impacting the market. S&P 500 closed at 6,034.91, Nasdaq Composite at 19,687.24. Real estate, IT, and materials stocks recorded losses. Carson Research's chief strategist noted insights for 2024.

news.headline: Bitcoin may face a 35% correction as it mirrors gold's past patterns at resistance levels.
news.summary: The recent comparison between Bitcoin and gold shows that Bitcoin is facing resistance levels similar to those seen at the beginning of the bear markets in 2018-2019 and 2021-2022. This suggests that Bitcoin's performance against gold is currently at a crucial point, indicating potential trends similar to those witnessed during previous bear markets.

news.headline: CG Oncology plans to conduct a public offering. No specific details were provided.
Registration now open for the 13th Annual Business Architecture Innovation Summit™ on March 18-20, 2025 in SAN FRANCISCO.
news.summary: Attend the leading business architecture conference taking place from March 18 to 20, 2025 in SAN FRANCISCO. On December 11, 2024, the Business Architecture Guild®, a global network of business architecture experts, announced their upcoming event. With a widespread presence in over 100 nations, industry professionals and leaders from various sectors are expected to participate in this exclusive gathering.

news.headline: Stevie Wonder's We Are You Foundation honored Arzum Ayse Inanoglu at Wayfinder Family Services' event.
news.summary: In a recent event in Los Angeles on December 11, 2024, Aundrae Russell, CEO of Stevie Wonder's We Are You Foundation, honored Arzum Ayse Inanoglu with the Stevie Wonder Star Student Award at Wayfinder Family Services' yearly holiday celebration. The award recognizes exceptional individuals within the organization, and this year's recipient was selected for their outstanding achievements. This marks a significant moment for Inanoglu, as they were acknowledged for their dedication and hard work by receiving this esteemed accolade.

news.headline: HKMA issues warning about fake sites linked to China CITIC Bank, tricking people with online banking. Be cautious!
news.summary: The public is being alerted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding fake websites and online banking login pages pretending to be China CITIC Bank International Limited. It is essential to stay cautious, as these fraudulent sites aim to deceive individuals. It is crucial to be vigilant while accessing online platforms related to banking operations. Stay informed and verify the authenticity of websites to protect personal and financial information. Take necessary precautions to prevent falling victim to such online scams. Being proactive is key to maintaining cybersecurity in the digital age.

news.headline: GFG raises C$3.7M from warrant exercise, boosts Timmins exploration efforts.
Volvo and DHL begin autonomous operations in Texas, aiming to transform freight transport in the US.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on December 11, 2024, Volvo Autonomous Solutions (V.A.S.) and DHL Supply Chain have unveiled a milestone initiative to revolutionize freight transport in the United States. This groundbreaking partnership will bring autonomous operations to the forefront, marking a crucial shift in the industry. This collaboration is poised to reshape the way goods are transported, with a focus on enhancing efficiency and safety. Stay tuned for further developments on this transformative project.

news.headline: Chairman of the Board Professor Hans Wigzell resigns from Karolinska Development AB, new Chairman to be appointed.
news.summary: In Stockholm, Sweden on December 11, 2024, Karolinska Development AB (traded on Nasdaq Stockholm as KDEV) revealed that Professor Hans Wigzell, the company’s Chairman of the Board, will step down from his role. The Board of Directors will promptly begin the search for a new Chairman to fill the vacancy.

news.headline: Nokia unveils 5G Banshee Flex Radio for advanced battlefield comms, designed for modern mobile broadband edge network.
Norsk Hydro ASA's share buyback program update, no specific numbers/figures mentioned.
news.summary: Below is a summary of the recent transactions carried out as part of the share buyback program of Norsk Hydro ASA:- Total number of shares repurchased: X- Average purchase price per share: $Y- Total amount spent on buyback program: $ZThese transactions are part of Norsk Hydro ASA's strategy to enhance shareholder value and optimize its capital structure.

news.headline: BitFuFu secures 10-year lease for 2 mining facilities in the US with 33 MW capacity, aims to acquire majority stake.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, BitFuFu Inc., a prominent player in Bitcoin mining and related services traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FUFU, disclosed securing 10-year exclusive lease contracts for two Bitcoin mining sites in the United States. These facilities possess a collective capacity of 33 megawatts (MW). The agreements further entail an option for BitFuFu to purchase a controlling interest in the said mining operations.

news.headline: Blackwell 3D is conducting a feasibility study for large-scale 3D-printed construction in the UAE, aiming to identify locations for the project.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Blackwell 3D Construction Corp. (OTC: BDCC) disclosed its commencement of a self-financed feasibility study to pinpoint optimal sites for a major 3D-printed housing endeavor in the UAE. As a pioneering 3D house printing technology entity, Blackwell 3D envisions revolutionizing the construction sector with advanced techniques focused on eco-friendliness and productivity. This venture marks a noteworthy progression in the adoption of innovative methodologies within the industry.

news.headline: Titan Mining Corp (TSX: TI, OTCQB: TIMCF) amends credit facility with National Bank to deleverage by end of 2025, allowing growth projects.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 11, 2024, Titan Mining Corporation (TSX: TI, OTCQB: TIMCF) has reached an agreement to amend its credit facility with the National Bank of Canada established on June 6, 2022. This amendment aims to reduce Titan's debt substantially by the conclusion of 2025, enabling the Company to have the flexibility to pursue several growth projects.

news.headline: ArcelorMittal and LanzaTech reach ethanol production milestone; first barge from flagship facility shipped in Belgium. Ethanol volumes support large-scale shipping to CarbonSmart customers like Coty.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, LanzaTech Global, Inc. (LNZA) and ArcelorMittal S.A. (MT) announced a significant milestone at ArcelorMittal's Steelanol facility in Ghent, Belgium. Ethanol production has increased to a level that allows for large-scale shipping by barge. LanzaTech received the first barge shipment earlier in the month, and the ethanol is now on its way to be purified and sold to CarbonSmart customers like Coty. This advancement marks progress in the joint effort between LanzaTech and ArcelorMittal to establish a sustainable ethanol supply chain in Europe.

news.headline: European Wax Center selects Chris Morris, with 25+ years of consumer business leadership, as new CEO.
news.summary: An experienced executive with over 25 years of leadership, operational, and development experience in consumer industries has been appointed to the team.

news.headline: Relay Therapeutics reports 11.4-month median PFS in 2L patients with PI3Kα-mutated, HR+/HER2- metastatic breast cancer.
news.summary: Recent interim data reveals that patients with PI3Kα-mutated, hormone receptor positive, HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer who are undergoing their second line of treatment have achieved a median progression-free survival of 11.4 months at the recommended phase 2 dose.

news.headline: Serina Therapeutics' Chief Development Officer to present at LNP Summit in Boston on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Serina Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that their Chief Development Officer, Randall Moreadith, MD, PhD, is set to speak at the 3rd Annual LNP Immunogenicity & Toxicity Summit in Boston, MA. The event will focus on "Overcoming Anti-PEG Antibody Responses" with a special emphasis on Serina's proprietary POZ Platform™ drug delivery technology. Serina is a clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on the NYSE American under the symbol SER. This news was shared on Dec. 11, 2024 from Huntsville, AL.
